pageDescription: Upload your resume (PDF or Word) and Gemini will pre-fill your Experience, Projects, Skills, Education, and Certifications. Review and edit everything before it's saved — nothing is added automatically.

upload.prompt: Select a PDF or Word (.docx) resume (max 10MB)
upload.extractingHint: This can take 15–30 seconds — Gemini is reading the full document.

experienceReview.allReviewed: All extracted experiences have been reviewed.

projectReview.allReviewed: All extracted projects have been reviewed.

skillsReview.addSelected: {count, plural, one {Add # selected skill} other {Add # selected skills}}
skillsReview.addedToast: {count, plural, one {# skill added} other {# skills added}}
skillsReview.skippedToast: {count, plural, one {# skill skipped} other {# skills skipped}}
skillsReview.skippedDescription: Already in your profile or failed to save.

educationReview.allReviewed: All extracted education has been reviewed.

certificationReview.allReviewed: All extracted certifications have been reviewed.
